response.justification: Strong full-stack fundamentals with 20 years of experience and explicit AI agent infrastructure background, but significant gaps exist: primary stack frameworks (Nest.js, React, Vitest) are not mentioned, and a critical resume integrity issue—the header name (Aisha Okonkwo) doesn't match any contact information or online profiles (all Szabo Bogdan)—requires clarification before proceeding.
strengths: Demonstrated AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience (current role), directly matching required skill
Proven full-stack architect with microservices at scale (Sociomantic: millions of requests/second) and staff-level roles
Strong testing and TDD culture evidenced by framework creation (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and training delivery
concerns: Critical resume inconsistency: header name (Aisha Okonkwo) conflicts with all contact details and profiles (Szabo Bogdan), raising authenticity questions
Missing explicit experience with primary stack frameworks: Nest.js, React, and Vitest not mentioned despite being core requirements
No demonstrated expertise in authentication, authorization, or security best practices as required

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and MCP experience in current role
Primary framework stack (Nest.js, React, Vitest) not demonstrated
